{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201734313554F35A6A2563BBCFC8"}"},"total":2402},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7446665968548692760","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书写得很有深度，立意明确，选的这个切入点也非常好，不同以往的那些小说。
对不同人物的刻画非常符合他们自身的定位，从一群山贼开始只知道掠夺，到最后的蜕变，写的是有理有据，包括主角在刚开始时所受到的遭遇，以及后来的转变，都有一个循序渐进的过程。
对当下时局以及天下大势的走向的判断，非常富有逻辑性，值得起推敲。
主角虽然是穿越者，且带有前世记忆，但很好的融入了其中，他的所作所为都尊重了当时的客观事实，并没有因此大搞特搞，这是难能可贵的。
我从头到尾都读了这本书，个人感觉还是挺不错的，我是真心的希望作者能够一直写下去。
当然，说真的，我也并不是全部都看了的，中间有一些快读和跳读，但也仅是一些，因为有一些地方实在太繁杂了，没了往下看的兴趣，就是很难调动我的阅读兴趣，希望后续作者能够对一些地方删繁就简，没有必要面面俱到。
最后我还是很期待这本书的后续的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733817154,"group_id":"7414507968034507801","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我始终坚信创新乃是赋予作品蓬勃生机的关键所在。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4vSdPJRKBWQOcrkZZYgnI4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/75b4a0897b1041f581cc3a906e6c14fd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528545&x-signature=GkswDgEUlEwFKt7Tf7KHOa%2BW3VE%3D","user_id":"611784376720800","user_name":"yang凯旋归来"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"611784376720800","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414507968034507801","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无外挂+穿清+种田+造反】公元1673年，康熙十二年春，吴三桂杀云南巡抚朱国治反叛满清，天下云集响应，酝酿起清初最大的一场动乱，史称三藩之乱。
侯俊铖就在三藩之乱的前夕穿越到了清朝，历史上的中华走上了一条百年屈辱的邪路，且看侯俊铖如何扭转乾坤，在百鬼夜行的黑夜之中高举赤旗，为国为民寻得一条赤阳如血的生路！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7ea5a192ebfe86a58654dc5f77cbade9","author":"金黄的鸡翅膀","author_id":"","book_id":"7414507968034507801","book_name":"赤潮覆清","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414508128672170521","read_count":"61444","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3382152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1618","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,清朝,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob41d6d5c22f334069c8b933ae5ba958a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183271&x-signature=QuGxZtYGA5tQHWiJcE4P31A8PMw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2960326718920423","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"313"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201734313554F35A6A2563BBCFC8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21899,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":47301},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450650694788039448","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小小缺点，
一是江西方言中的许多词汇不太对劲。譬如说，俺、阿爷、幺儿之类的有点出戏，如果这方面能精修一下子是最好。
二是主角对话有明显的化用借用风格，有一段真的像是在看《古田军号》。
当然网文高频率更新也不好苛求太多，总体上瑕不掩瑜。质量不错，有当初看《赤色黎明》的感觉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734747952,"group_id":"7414507968034507801","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0gDeCokmmhaSpQwqlgUnXgTbRJOQUTrI5G98y6t2aTT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4161029779238062","user_name":"喜欢蕃薯的闫刚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4161029779238062","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414507968034507801","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无外挂+穿清+种田+造反】公元1673年，康熙十二年春，吴三桂杀云南巡抚朱国治反叛满清，天下云集响应，酝酿起清初最大的一场动乱，史称三藩之乱。
侯俊铖就在三藩之乱的前夕穿越到了清朝，历史上的中华走上了一条百年屈辱的邪路，且看侯俊铖如何扭转乾坤，在百鬼夜行的黑夜之中高举赤旗，为国为民寻得一条赤阳如血的生路！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7ea5a192ebfe86a58654dc5f77cbade9","author":"金黄的鸡翅膀","author_id":"","book_id":"7414507968034507801","book_name":"赤潮覆清","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414508128672170521","read_count":"61444","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3382152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1618","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,清朝,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob41d6d5c22f334069c8b933ae5ba958a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183271&x-signature=QuGxZtYGA5tQHWiJcE4P31A8PMw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2960326718920423","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"193"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201734313554F35A6A2563BBCFC8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33486,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":21237},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7504067901646537497","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"听了这么久还没评论有点不合适。这是穿越后红色革命文里改造最彻底，描写问题最实际的一本书，也没浪费笔墨写什么女主后宫的内容。曾想过如果真的有一天通知说要集体穿越了，没有系统金手指的话，最好是拉住作者一起组队，他是懂社会革命理论的[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747183905,"group_id":"7414507968034507801","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/ipjaI6JpymRkWFetp3Yu/dMAg1vD7hFo6kM/DmZZ1p","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dcd3fa0ae46642558adc92a572be5386~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530979&x-signature=PbCRVERuQ39j1nC3Ofa1iNRVk9A%3D","user_id":"3145023797345664","user_name":"冰蓝露珠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3145023797345664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414507968034507801","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统+无外挂+穿清+种田+造反】公元1673年，康熙十二年春，吴三桂杀云南巡抚朱国治反叛满清，天下云集响应，酝酿起清初最大的一场动乱，史称三藩之乱。
